title: Beans Backpacks Knowlogy
description: Knowlogy Book addon with information about the Beans Backpacks mod.
body:
![Beans Backpacks Category](https://gitlab.com/VinnyStalck/knowlogy/-/raw/beans-backpacks-3/main/assets/images/beansbackpacks-category.png)

![Modrinth Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/Pb1H9v0l?label=Latest%20Version&labelColor=242424&color=1e1e1e)
![Modrinth Minecraft Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/Pb1H9v0l?label=Minecraft%20Versions&labelColor=242424&color=1e1e1e)

[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/Pb1H9v0l?style=flat&logo=modrinth&label=Downloads&labelColor=03190a&color=1e1e1e)](https://modrinth.com/mod/beans-backpacks-knowlogy)
[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1155128?style=flat&logo=curseforge&label=Downloads&labelColor=241009&color=1e1e1e)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/beans-backpacks-knowlogy)

This is an addon mod for [Knowlogy](https://modrinth.com/mod/knowlogy) that adds [Beans Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/beans-backpacks-3) mod descriptions to the **Book o' Knowlogy**, showing information from the [official Beans Backpack 3 Wiki](https://github.com/BeansGalaxy/Beans-Backpacks-3/wiki).

## Features

### Crafting Recipes

Learn how to make the items added by [Beans Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/beans-backpacks-3) mod.

![Backpack Entry](https://gitlab.com/VinnyStalck/knowlogy/-/raw/beans-backpacks-3/main/assets/images/backpack-entry.png)

### Detailed Descriptions

Official explanations on how to use the mod gathered directly from the [wiki](https://github.com/BeansGalaxy/Beans-Backpacks-3/wiki) with images.

![Using Backpack Entry](https://gitlab.com/VinnyStalck/knowlogy/-/raw/beans-backpacks-3/main/assets/images/using_backpack-entry.png)

### Organized Categories

It's easy to find the information that you looking for with categories and links to related entries.

![Backpack Category](https://gitlab.com/VinnyStalck/knowlogy/-/raw/beans-backpacks-3/main/assets/images/backpacks-category.png)
